name: Kobalte
description: Unstyled, accessible UI toolkit for building design systems and web apps with SolidJS

description.value: Unstyled, accessible UI toolkit for building design systems and web apps with SolidJS

license.comment: Open source MIT license, created by Fabien Marie-Louise

active-maintenance.comment: Active - 1,014 commits, 50 contributors, v0.13.11 released July 2025

initial-release.comment: First commits and releases began in 2022

framework.comment: Built exclusively for SolidJS, works with SolidStart

styling-approach.comment: Completely unstyled components; compatible with vanilla CSS, Tailwind, CSS-in-JS, Vanilla Extract, UnoCSS

component-model.comment: Headless component library providing behavior and accessibility without visual styles

typescript.comment: Written in TypeScript (69.7% of codebase), first-class type definitions

ssr-compatible.comment: Works out of the box with SolidStart; tested with @solidjs/start 0.3.0 and SolidJS 1.7.0

rsc-compatible.comment: Not applicable - SolidJS library, not React

design-system.comment: Headless library with no design system; Pigment is a separate styled component library built on Kobalte

dark-mode.comment: Unstyled - dark mode implementation is user's responsibility

theming-system.comment: No built-in theming system - unstyled components allow complete custom theming

css-variables.comment: Unstyled components don't include CSS variables; users implement their own

design-tokens.comment: No design tokens provided - headless library focused on behavior and accessibility

rtl-support.comment: RTL support via I18nProvider component for internationalization and direction

component-count.comment: 50+ components documented including form inputs, navigation, overlays, feedback, and utilities

text-input.comment: Text Field component for text input

textarea.comment: Text Field can render as textarea via multiline prop

select.comment: Select component with keyboard navigation and accessibility

multi-select.comment: Select component supports multiple selection mode

combobox.comment: Combobox component with autocomplete and filtering

checkbox.comment: Checkbox component with indeterminate state support

radio.comment: Radio Group component for radio button groups

switch-toggle.comment: Switch component for boolean toggle values

number-input.comment: Number Field component with increment/decrement controls

color-picker.comment: Comprehensive color picker with Color Field, Color Area, Color Slider, Color Wheel, Color Channel Field, and Color Swatch components

date-picker.comment: Not provided; Time Field is available but no calendar-based date picker

time-picker.comment: Time Field component for time input

file-upload.comment: File Field component for file input

dropzone.comment: Not provided as separate drag-and-drop component

rating-input.comment: Rating Group component for star ratings

input-with-dropdown.comment: Not provided, but can be composed using Select or Popover

button-groups.comment: Toggle Group and Segmented Control act as grouped button controls

split-button.comment: Not provided, but can be composed with Dropdown Menu

table.comment: Not provided - use native HTML table

data-table.comment: Not provided - beyond headless primitive scope

card.comment: Not provided - layout component beyond primitive scope

progress-bar.comment: Progress component for determinate progress indicator

progress-circle.comment: Not provided; Progress component is linear only

modal-dialog.comment: Dialog and Alert Dialog components with focus trapping and scroll lock

drawer-sheet.comment: Not provided as distinct component; Dialog can be styled as drawer

dropdown-menu.comment: Dropdown Menu component with keyboard navigation

context-menu.comment: Context Menu component for right-click menus

command-palette.comment: Not provided; can be composed with Dialog and Search

navigation-menu.comment: Navigation Menu component with dropdown support

sidebar.comment: Not provided; use Collapsible for sidebar patterns

grid.comment: Not provided - CSS layout beyond primitive scope

stack.comment: Not provided - CSS layout beyond primitive scope

container.comment: Not provided - CSS layout beyond primitive scope

collapsible.comment: Collapsible component for expandable content sections

form-libraries.comment: Works with Modular Forms via documented integration guide; Modular Forms is the SolidJS equivalent of React Hook Form

animation-libraries.comment: Supports CSS keyframe animations and JavaScript animation libraries via forceMount prop; no specific library integration documented

icon-libraries.comment: No bundled or officially documented icon library; compatible with any icon library (lucide-solid, etc.)

date-libraries.comment: No date picker component, so no date library integrations

aria-compliant.comment: Follows WAI-ARIA Authoring Practices with automatic ARIA attributes, focus management, and keyboard navigation

keyboard-navigation.comment: Full keyboard navigation support across all interactive components

screen-reader-tested.comment: Not explicitly documented whether tested with screen readers

focus-management.comment: Automatic focus management including focus trapping in modals, focus restoration, and onOpenAutoFocus/onCloseAutoFocus handlers

wcag-level.comment: No specific WCAG level documented; follows WAI-ARIA patterns

accessibility-rating.comment: Good - WAI-ARIA compliant, keyboard navigation, focus management; inspired by Radix UI, React Aria, Ariakit which are accessibility leaders

bundle-size-full.comment: Not applicable - tree-shakeable library, import individual components

bundle-size-core.comment: Bundle size varies by component; tree-shakeable imports

tree-shakeable.comment: Components can be imported individually for tree-shaking

zero-runtime.comment: JavaScript runtime required for component behavior and accessibility

lazy-loading.comment: Components can be imported individually and loaded on demand

documentation-quality.comment: Good - comprehensive API docs, code examples, guides for styling/SSR/animation, keyboard navigation reference

figma-kit.comment: No official Figma design kit available

cli-generator.comment: No CLI tool; install via npm/pnpm/yarn

npm-weekly-downloads.comment: ~59k weekly downloads for @kobalte/core as of December 2025

commercial-support.comment: Open source MIT licensed; OpenCollective for sponsorship but no commercial support tier

style-override.comment: Class prop on all components; data-* attributes for state-based styling with Tailwind plugin, Vanilla Extract plugin, or UnoCSS

compound-components.comment: Composable compound component pattern (e.g., Dialog.Root, Dialog.Trigger, Dialog.Content)

render-props.comment: Uses children composition pattern rather than render props

slots.comment: Uses compound component pattern rather than named slots

unstyled-mode.comment: Entirely unstyled by default - headless component library providing only behavior and accessibility
